source_description: Deploy mcpbin v0.1.0 as a free public hosted instance on a Hugging Face Docker Space (UI at /, MCP at /mcp), add a GitHub Actions release workflow that attaches correct artifacts on v* tags, verify the live endpoint, and document the live URL. Scope: HF Space only; GitHub-release artifacts only (no PyPI); deploy-ready + verified (manual HF Space creation by the maintainer).
